CustomField.formula: IF( OR( LEFT(SBQQ__ExternalId__c, 3) = "015", LEFT(SBQQ__ExternalId__c, 3) = "00P" ), HYPERLINK( "/servlet/servlet.FileDownload?file=" & SBQQ__ExternalId__c, "View Document" ), IF( LEFT(SBQQ__ExternalId__c, 3) = "069", HYPERLINK( "/lightning/r/ContentDocument/" & SBQQ__ExternalId__c & "/view", "View Document" ), "Invalid Document ID" ) )
CustomField.label: Document Name Link
